item.title: 【2026-07-16】National Institute for Basic Biology: "Summer Internship for University Students 2026" - Participant Recruitment

item.title: 【2026-07-16】The National Institute for Basic Biology (SOKENDAI, Graduate University for Advanced Studies, Department of Basic Biology) will hold a graduate school information session on August 28th (Friday) in a hybrid format, both in-person and online.
item.description: The National Institute for Basic Biology (SOKENDAI, Graduate University for Advanced Studies, Department of Basic Biology) will hold a graduate school information session on August 28th (Friday) in a hybrid format, both in-person and online.
